overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person walk through Night City's dense orange smog. The player navigates from narrow alleyways past neon-lit food stalls, under elevated highways, through commercial walkways with holographic advertisements, and up stairs to emerge onto a foggy boulevard lined with palm trees.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a foggy narrow street between tall concrete buildings, following distant pedestrians

entered.detail: massive brutalist concrete towers flanking both sides of the narrow alley
distant glowing signs barely visible through the orange smog
tall street lamps casting diffuse light through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, fog-filled alley between towering concrete buildings. The orange smog limits visibility to the glowing neon signs and streetlights ahead. Sparse pedestrians walk in the same direction as the camera through the damp concrete corridor.

events.description: emerging from narrow alley into a more open area with a brightly lit food stall

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a brightly illuminated food kiosk while navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: child walking alongside an adult through the plaza

entered.detail: small food vendor stall with bright cyan and white LED lighting
contemporary building facade with large illuminated windows and teal neon accents

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the confined alley to a more open plaza area. A brightly lit food kiosk dominates the left side with intense white and cyan lighting, while a modern glass building with teal neon accents rises on the right. The camera passes the kiosk and approaches the building entrance.

events.description: passing under the shadow of the elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along a wide street beneath an elevated highway, passing other pedestrians and approaching traffic lights

notable_agents.action: distant car with headlights on, driving through the fog

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning across the street above
large vertical advertisement for El Guapo with purple and yellow colors
suspended traffic signals hanging over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. Large digital billboards including one for 'El Guapo' line the left side, while traffic lights hang suspended over the foggy road. Sparse vehicle traffic moves through the haze as pedestrians walk along the sidewalk.

events.description: entering a covered pedestrian walkway lined with shops and neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking through a vibrant commercial corridor, passing seated pedestrians and browsing shop fronts

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the palm tree planter

entered.detail: large illuminated sign for All Foods restaurant with red and yellow colors
neon sign for The Big House Burrito XXL with red lettering
palm trees in large concrete planters lining the walkway
storefronts with glowing windows and merchandise displays

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered commercial walkway sheltered from the weather. Bright neon signs for 'All Foods' and 'The Big House' dominate the scene, while palm trees in planters add greenery to the urban environment. The wet tiled floor reflects the vibrant red and purple neon lighting from the shop fronts.

events.description: beginning to ascend a long flight of concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing a steep flight of concrete stairs flanked by neon advertisements and digital posters

notable_agents.action: figure standing at the top of the stairs silhouetted against the bright exit

entered.detail: long flight of wide concrete steps leading upward between building walls
illuminated advertising posters mounted on the stairwell walls

segments.scene_description: The segment focuses on ascending a long concrete stairwell between tall building walls. Neon signs and digital posters line both sides of the narrow passage, casting colored light on the steps. The camera climbs steadily toward a bright exit at the top where a figure stands silhouetted against the orange fog.

events.description: exiting the stairwell onto an open foggy boulevard lined with palm trees
approaching and crossing a marked pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: emerging onto a wide foggy street and crossing the pedestrian crosswalk toward a commercial building

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the boulevard, visible through the fog
tall digital billboard kiosk displaying animated advertisements
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The final segment emerges from the stairwell onto a wide, fog-shrouded boulevard lined with palm trees. A digital advertising kiosk stands prominently near the crosswalk as the camera crosses the yellow-striped pedestrian crossing. The heavy orange smog obscures distant buildings, creating an atmospheric cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, smog-filled alleyway into a sprawling urban thoroughfare. It begins within a narrow concrete corridor where dense orange fog obscures the towering buildings, leaving only the glow of neon signs to guide the way past sparse pedestrians. As the camera moves forward, the confined space opens into a brightly lit plaza, shifting the palette toward intense white and cyan light as it passes a glowing food kiosk and a glass building with teal accents. The scene then expands further, emerging from the plaza to reveal a wide street beneath the massive shadow of an elevated highway overpass. Finally, the view opens across a foggy road lined with large digital billboards and suspended traffic lights, where vehicles and pedestrians drift through the persistent haze.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered neon commercial hub, ascending through a narrow passage to emerge into a smog-filled urban boulevard. It begins within a covered walkway where wet tiled floors reflect the vibrant red and purple glow of All Foods and The Big House signs amidst potted palm trees. As the camera leaves the shelter, the scene shifts to a steady climb up a long concrete stairwell flanked by digital posters and colored lights, moving toward a silhouetted figure at the summit. The perspective then breaks out from the enclosure onto a wide, fog-shrouded street, passing a digital advertising kiosk and crossing a yellow-striped pedestrian walk. Finally, the view opens across a cityscape of palm trees and distant buildings heavily obscured by a thick, atmospheric orange smog.
